title: Parakmeria robusta
intro:

If you are looking for information on Parakmeria nujiangensis, here is a short paragraph about it:

Parakmeria nujiangensis is a plant species in the family Meliaceae, native to Yunnan, China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Parakmeria nujiangensis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from Parakmeria nujiangensis include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
